records.v: Big granuloma attached to the dorsal aspect of the caudal thoracic air sac and the caudal area of the left lung, craneal to the gonad. Was not possible to remove due to unstable anaesthesia. The removal of the granuloma need to be planed after some time. Is a cronic and encapsulated granuloma.
X-ray taken, left pectoral muscle is atrophied

X-ray taken, left leg 4th digit finger missing
X-ray taken, mild airsacculitis, yellowish deposits in epidermititis, proventriculus enlarged
